backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining data types (UserProfile, VideoClip, FeedbackSubmission, etc.) and core logic including clip similarity scoring, OAuth credential storage, trending analytics, and feedback submission with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module that defines a no-op `run` function returning the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (role-based access removal for YouTube features, banned/suspended account blocking screen, and OAuth connection fix) to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose of each frontend source file, serving as documentation for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/.env: Environment file containing the Vite Google OAuth Client ID used for Google/YouTube authentication in the frontend.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with a detailed step-by-step guide for obtaining and configuring a Google OAuth Client ID, including troubleshooting tips.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard gitignore for a Vite/Node frontend project, excluding node_modules, dist, editor files, and environment variable files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app titled 'Beast Clipping' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router and React Query, defines the RootLayout wrapping all routes in AccountStatusGuard, and implements the HomePage with YouTube URL input, player, clip creation, suggestions, and channel connection UI.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusErr: Displays a full-screen error page for banned or suspended users with relevant messaging and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusGua: Wraps children and blocks access for authenticated users with banned or suspended account status, showing a loading spinner or the error screen as appropriate.
Renders a debug card for admins showing authentication info, admin principals, hashmap size, and initialization status with copy and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and displays error details with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a card listing all current admin users by their principal ID and generated short ID, with loading and error states.
Provides a form to add a new admin by principal ID and renders the AdminList component below it, with success and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard page that shows platform stats, collapsible debug/user-status/feedback sections, and the admin management UI.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordInp: File appears to be empty or truncated; no content available to summarize.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: React component that displays a card for connecting/disconnecting a Google/YouTube account, showing channel status, avatar, and connect button with tooltip support.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: React component rendering a single video clip as a card with thumbnail, duration, viral score badge, and actions for deleting, downloading, or posting to YouTube.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: React component that fetches and displays a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard, with loading and empty states.
React component that shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clip suggestions, each with timestamps, viral score, and a button to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: React component providing a form to set start/end timestamps and a title for creating a video clip, with support for pre-filling from selected clips or AI suggestions.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: Modal dialog component for submitting user feedback as either a feature request or bug report, with form validation and submission via a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of feedback submissions (bug reports and feature requests) with type badges, submitter info, and timestamps, and allows deletion of individual submissions via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing the sticky header with navigation, authentication (Internet Identity login/logout), admin button visibility logic, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form that collects a new user's name and email, then saves their profile to the backend with default role and status values.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the authenticated user's short User ID and full Principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge with an icon representing a user's role (Owner, Admin, User, or Friend) with configurable size.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin panel card that lists all users in a searchable table and allows changing each user's role and account status via dropdowns.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: A form component that accepts a YouTube URL, validates it, loads the video, and optionally triggers AI-powered clip generation via a secondary button.
A badge component that displays a viral potential score with color coding and icons based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: A simple card component that renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed given a video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: A mutation hook that calls the backend to add a new admin by user ID and invalidates admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: A query hook that fetches admin debug information (principal, admin status) for the current authenticated user, with placeholder fields pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: A query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready.
An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: A hook that fetches total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend using two parallel React Query queries.
A mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions and falls back to mock AI-generated clips if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: A mutation hook that saves a new video clip to the backend, calculating a viral score based on clip duration and title keywords before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: A hook that fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with per-clip loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: A stateful hook managing start/end timestamp inputs (minutes and seconds), with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: A mutation hook that deletes a feedback submission by ID, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to generate a download URL for a video clip and triggers a browser file download with a sanitized filename.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: Query hook that fetches all feedback submissions from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: Mutation hook that submits user feedback to the backend and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error instead of throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Computer authentication via AuthClient, including login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Query hook that checks whether the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with detailed debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook that validates Google OAuth credentials and clip duration, then posts a video clip to YouTube Shorts via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of query and mutation hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth credential storage, and YouTube connection status checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that updates a target user's role via the backend and invalidates related role queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Mutation hook that updates a target user's status via the backend and invalidates related user queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: Query hook that fetches all user roles from the backend and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: React hook that manages YouTube channel connection state, providing queries for channel status and mutations to connect (via Google OAuth redirect) or disconnect a YouTube channel using the backend actor.
Simple hook exposing utility functions to validate YouTube URLs via regex and extract the 11-character video ID from a URL.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light and dark theme CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: Page component that handles the Google OAuth redirect callback, waits for the backend actor to become available, exchanges the authorization code, and navigates to the home page on success or displays an error.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Exports a single function that deterministically generates an 8-character base-36 user ID from a principal string using a simple hash algorithm.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for the YouTube OAuth flow that provides structured logging, OAuth response validation, and common error pattern matching with suggestions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps CSS custom property OKLCH color tokens to Tailwind color names, extends theme with custom radius, fonts, shadows, and accordion animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Beast Clipping project state at version 3, documenting existing features around YouTube integration, role-based access, and banned/suspended user screens, along with three pending fix/feature requests and a known YouTube connection issue.
